data.text: A BEAUTIFUL FELISIAN PLANET; ALMOST AS BEAUTIFUL AS SURICRASIA OR
THIS THIRD WORLD IN THE HOME SWEET PIXEL SYSTEM IS JUST STUNNING AND
BREATHTAKING; WITH INCREDIBLE SUNSETS AND SUNRISES, ANDS WAST, BLUE
OCEANS AND EVEN LARGER GREEN PLAINS, ALL UNDER A PERFECT TEMPERATURE
THIS IS THE KIND OF HEAVEN A STARDRIFTER LOOKS FOR AMONG THE INFINETY
ALOSIA SPORTS A HUGE COLLECTION OF PLANT AND WILD-LIFE, PLUSS A ALMOST
MYSTERIOUS ATMOSPHERE. THIS IS A WORLD OF STUNNING BEAUTY - WORTH A
VISIT BY THOSE HEADING THIS WAY TOWARD THE GALACTIC RIM.
